name: Substack
description: Discover newsletters, read articles, and explore Substack's content network

user_stories.i_want: to browse the Substack homepage for recommended newsletters
user_stories.so_that: I can discover new writers and topics that interest me

user_stories.i_want: to read the latest post from a specific Substack newsletter
user_stories.so_that: I stay up to date with my favorite writers

user_stories.i_want: to search Substack for articles on a specific topic
user_stories.so_that: I can find in-depth analysis and perspectives from independent writers
